fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan (adds ~$39.95 fee) OR FD-258 hard card via mail (tip: moisturize hands for days prior to reduce smudge rejects)

seo.title: Virginia Physical Therapist License Reciprocity - How to Transfer Your License (2026)
seo.description: Already licensed as a physical therapist? Here's whether your license transfers to Virginia - compact status, endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.
seo.keywords: physical therapist license reciprocity virginia, how to transfer physical therapist license to virginia, physical therapist compact virginia, virginia physical therapist endorsement application

board.name: Virginia Board of Medicine — PT
board.mailing_address:
Virginia Board of Physical Therapy
Perimeter Center
9960 Mayland Drive, Suite 300
Henrico, VA 23233-1463

quick_facts.ce_requirement: 30 hours of continuing education every two years

license_types.title: PT, DPT
license_types.description: The standard credential to practice as a physical therapist in Virginia.

steps.title: Create Account and Start Application
steps.description: Visit the DHP Online Services Portal at https://www.license.dhp.virginia.gov/. If you are a new user, create an account. Log in and select the 'Physical Therapist - Endorsement' application to begin.

steps.title: Complete Online Application and Submit Fee
steps.description: Fill out the comprehensive online application form within the DHP Online Services Portal. Ensure all required fields are completed and pay the necessary application and initial licensure fee of $195.

steps.title: Arrange Verification of Original Licensure
steps.description: Contact the licensing board from the state where you were originally licensed by examination. Request that an official verification of this license be sent directly to the Virginia Board of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Arrange Verification of All Other Licenses
steps.description: For every other state, territory, or district where you have ever held a Physical Therapist license, arrange for an official verification to be sent directly from that jurisdiction's board to the Virginia Board of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Submit Military Experience Form (If Applicable)
steps.description: If you are claiming military experience for licensure, complete and submit the Military Experience & Training Form directly to the Virginia Board of Physical Therapy.

documents.detail: Sent directly from your educational institution.
Official verification of passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination).

provisional_text: Many states offer a limited permit or provisional license for new graduates waiting to take the NPTE. Check specific board rules for supervisory requirements.
reciprocity_text: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

faqs.question: How much does a Virginia physical therapist license cost?
faqs.answer: For endorsement applicants, the state licensing fee is $195. Additional third-party costs (fingerprinting, transcripts, or verification) may apply.

faqs.question: Is national certification required?
faqs.answer: Yes, passing the NPTE (National Physical Therapy Examination) is a standard requirement for initial licensure across almost all states.

faqs.question: Does Virginia have reciprocity for physical therapists?
faqs.answer: Yes. Virginia participates in the PT Compact. If your home state and license qualify for compact privilege, you can typically practice in Virginia without a separate endorsement application.

faqs.question: How long does it take to transfer my physical therapist license to Virginia?
faqs.answer: Current board processing time is 4 to 6 Weeks once your file is complete.

faqs.question: Can I start working in Virginia while my endorsement application is processing?
faqs.answer: A temporary or provisional credential is available while the full endorsement application is pending.

reciprocity.notes: Physical Therapists licensed in another state can often apply via endorsement by providing license verification and current certification.

hero.title: Become a Physical Therapist in Virginia
hero.dek: To apply for a Physical Therapist license in Virginia, navigate to the DHP Online Services Portal to begin your application by endorsement or examination.

official_links.registration_steps: To begin, visit the DHP Online Services Portal. New users must create an account by clicking 'Register a New Account'. Once registered and logged in, select 'Initial Application' and then choose the appropriate Physical Therapist application type (e.g., 'Physical Therapist - Endorsement').
